entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "Tanungin mo muna ako bago magpaliwanag nang sobra."

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "Suriin muna ang sagot ko bago ibigay ang sa iyo."

entries.source: "Debate ambition with Steve Jobs"
entries.value: "Debate ambisyon kasama ang Steve Mga gawain"

entries.source: "Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg"
entries.value: "Debate klima polisiya kasama ang Greta Thunberg"

entries.source: "Debate justice with Batman"
entries.value: "Debate katarungan kasama ang Batman"

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Bigyan mo ako ng mas mahirap na bersyon pagkatapos kong subukan."

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "Panatilihin itong beginner-friendly."

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Gumamit ng mga halimbawa mula sa exam, proyekto, o araw-araw kong buhay."

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: AI mga prompt

entries.source: Argument
entries.value: Argumento

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: Humingi ng isang tiny una gawain.

entries.source: Debate with a personality prompts and study loop
entries.value: Debate kasama ang isang personality mga prompt at loop sa pag-aaral

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: End kasama ang isang recap ikaw magsulat yourself.

entries.source: For Debate with a personality, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Para sa Debate kasama ang isang personality, isang kapaki-pakinabang loop ng pagsasanay ay:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice argument by debating a public or fictional personality on a topic you choose.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Magsanay ng argumento ng debating isang pampubliko o fictional personality sa isang paksa ikaw pumili.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Mahusay mga prompt karaniwan isama tatlo things: ang paksa, iyong kasalukuyan antas, at ang kind ng tulong ikaw gusto. Ikaw gawin hindi kailangan perfect wording. Ikaw lamang kailangan enough konteksto para sa ang session sa magsimula.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Kung ang response feels too broad, narrow ito. Humingi ng isa halimbawa, isa maling akala, isa suriin tanong, o isa susunod hakbang. Kung ito feels too madali, Humingi ng isang challenge. Kung ito feels too mahirap, Humingi ng isang bridge mula sa ano ikaw na alam.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: Gumawa ng ang output mas marami kapaki-pakinabang

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Debate with a personality on inspir.
entries.value: Prompt mga ideya at isang nauulit loop sa pag-aaral para sa getting kapaki-pakinabang pag-aaral mga resulta mula sa Debate kasama ang isang personality sa inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Pagbabasa isang AI response ay hindi ang same bilang pag-aaral. Pagkatapos ang una sagot, magtanong ang mode gumawa ikaw gawin something kasama ang ideya.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: Kaugnay mga landas sa pag-aaral

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Request feedback sa ang part na felt hindi tiyak.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Respond bago pagtatanong para sa ang solusyon.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Magsimula kasama ang isa malinaw request

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: Estado ang layunin sa isa sentence.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: study skills sa pag-aaral

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Na huli recap ay important. Kapag ikaw Ipaliwanag ang ideya likod, ikaw reveal Ano ang solid at Ano ang pa rin borrowed mula sa ang AI.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Ang pinakamahusay mga session sa pag-aaral ay adjustable. Ang debate uses pampubliko estilo at worldview nang walang pretending sa alam pribado beliefs.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Debate with a personality is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Ang pinakamabilis na paraan para makakuha ng halaga mula sa Debate kasama ang personality ay bigyan ang AI ng gawain sa pag-aaral, hindi lang paksa. Sinasabi ng paksa kung ano ang interesado ka. Sinasabi ng gawain sa pag-aaral kung anong uri ng tulong ang kailangan mo.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Pagkatapos add isang constraint na gumagawa ang session mas marami personal:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: Subukan isa ng mga ito starters:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: Gawing ang mode inmagsanay

entries.source: Use Debate with a personality when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Talk to a historical person. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Gamitin Debate kasama ang isang personality kapag ito ay ang tama mode para sa ang gawain. Kung ikaw gusto isang kaugnay landas, subukan Makipag-usap kay isang Pangkasaysayan Tao. Ikaw Maaari bang also Tingnan ang AI pag-aaral blog para sa study mga paraan, Socratic pag-aaral, mga flashcard, roleplay, at aktibong pag-alala.
